info.title: SDL2 Game Controller Test
info.author: Daniel K. O.
info.description: A tool to test your controllers.
info.details:
This is a simple application to test game controllers, using the SDL2 library, and ImGui.

Both the low-level "Joystick" and the high-level "GameController" inputs are shown.

Real-time graphs show movement of sticks and button presses.

Note that not all SDL2 features exist yet in the Wii U port, so some parts of the UI are unresponsive (like rumble.) This is not a bug, it's just a missing feature.
